title: Set up Better Auth in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Full Better Auth integration for Next.js App Router — install the library, configure a database adapter (Prisma or Drizzle), generate schema, create the API route handler, set up the typed client, and wire up email/password and OAuth providers.
declaration: I will set up Better Auth for this Next.js App Router project. Better Auth is a TypeScript-first authentication library that works with your existing database (Prisma, Drizzle, MongoDB, etc.) and supports email/password, OAuth, 2FA, organizations, passkeys, and more via a plugin system. If you are already using Clerk, Auth.js, or another auth provider, tell me before I begin.
